gates.note: Live 6/11 ~10 AM ET: price RECLAIMED the band (6/10 close 693.69 -> ~704.86, high 705.55, low 696.82). Stage-only mechanically; full-size pends a hold above 705. FULL SOURCE READ (caught up 6/11): Newton is near-term cautious - 6/10 daily: "lower prices into next week, bearish & choppy, BUT broader uptrend not in jeopardy"; 6/8: dead-cat-bounce / 675 risk. BUT June monthly reframes this: Newton Tech OW->Neutral is UNTIL THE MIDTERMS = a timing/pecking-order trim, NOT a thesis break; both authors call the early-June unwind "consolidation to buy into, not a top." Net: near-term chop is expected and the add-window likely opens during this base-building - consistent with stage-only, not stand-down. Lee strategic layer (thesis) intact.
gates.confirm_rule: full size when today's session holds above ~705; close back below 695 re-reds the gate

gates.note: SMH 6/9: 10% intraday range, IV rank 100, P/C 4.5 - washout characteristics; favors staged entries over chases
